messages.content: Generate web-search queries to verify or refute market-risk hypotheses. Queries must contain concrete entities (directive names, vendor names, country + year), never topic words. Each risk gets one CONFIRMING query, one FALSIFYING query (search for what would disconfirm — derived from the falsifier field), and one BASE-RATE/analog query where useful.

content: {"items":[{"riskId":"risk.regulatory-gauntlet.cra-conformity-clock-outlasts-yam-window","queries":[{"query":"Cyber Resilience Act EU 2024/2847 networked PDU intelligent power distribution unit conformity requirement","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"2026 data center PDU RFQ specification document CRA cyber conformity SBOM requirement","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"CRA important products Annex III class I self-assessment PDU remote management classification ENISA","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.regulatory-gauntlet.mid-eichrecht-billing-metering-forecloses-german-colo","queries":[{"query":"MessEG §32 PTB Eichrecht legal metrology approval PDU outlet metering colocation Germany","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"German colocation PDU tender specification MID-compliant outlet metering 2026 EnEfG measured billing","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"German data center sub-metering billing practice capacity tier vs measured kWh colo tenant survey","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.regulatory-gauntlet.red-en18031-wireless-sensor-gate","queries":[{"query":"Radio Equipment Directive delegated act 2022/30 EN 18031 cybersecurity notified body wireless PDU sensor","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"EN 18031-1 harmonized standard restrictions self-declaration access control password requirement notified body","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"RED cybersecurity delegated act EN 18031 notified body queue delay IoT device 2025 launch timeline","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.regulatory-gauntlet.avl-framework-qualification-forecloses-large-operator-cell","queries":[{"query":"approved vendor list qualification ISO 27001 IEC 62443-4-1 attestation PDU supplier data center operator","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"large data center operator 2026 PDU tender open to new vendors non-AVL fast track qualification","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"Digital Realty Schneider Electric $373 million agreement global framework PDU power distribution contract","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.regulatory-gauntlet.enefg-eed-reporting-spec-creep-dcim-lock","queries":[{"query":"EnEfG §12 Energieeffizienzregister data center reporting PDU metering accuracy requirement Germany","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"2026 colo PDU specification SNMP Redfish open protocol DCIM integration EcoStruxure Vertiv Environet Sunbird","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"EU Delegated Regulation 2024/1364 data centre energy performance rating scheme reporting requirements monitoring","kind":"base-rate"}]}]}
